Investigative SOP.snippet: CHAPTER 8 8 NARCOTIC DRUGS AND PSYCHOTROPIC SUBSTANCES (NDPS) The term ‘narcotic’ in the legal sense is quite different from that used in the medical context which denotes a sleep inducing agent.
